description: Use this API to change the value of an element of the CON array. The element is specified relative to the beginning of the CON array. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = change_con(number, newval)

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Con number or array index (must be between 1 and the number of cons allowed at the present size level of psse). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newval
parameters.description: New value to be assigned to con (number). (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
